message:
fix(sync): validate JSONL fd metadata after open (beads_rust-uopk)

Pre-open path validation in sync/path.rs races the filesystem: between
validate_sync_path and File::open a same-user attacker could swap the
target to a non-regular file. Close the TOCTOU gap by adding
validate_jsonl_fd_metadata() which checks fstat on the opened fd,
confirming it is still a regular file regardless of what the path now
points to. Called from all five JSONL open sites in sync/mod.rs:
scan_conflict_markers, for_each_jsonl_import_issue, analyze_jsonl,
read_issues_from_jsonl, and compute_jsonl_hash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
